name: Cow
hint: A large domesticated bovine animal, often raised for milk and meat.

name: Duck
hint: A waterfowl with webbed feet, known for its quacking sound.

name: Goat
hint: A small domesticated ruminant mammal, raised for milk and meat.

name: Horse
hint: A strong and fast-running domesticated animal, often used for transportation.

name: Lamb
hint: A young sheep, known for its tender meat.

name: Pig
hint: A domesticated omnivorous mammal, raised for its pork.

name: Rabbit
hint: A small burrowing mammal known for its long ears and hopping gait.

name: Sheep
hint: A domesticated ruminant mammal raised for its wool and meat.

name: Turkey
hint: A large bird raised for its meat, especially during Thanksgiving.

name: Alpaca
hint: A domesticated South American camelid known for its soft fleece.

name: Bull
hint: An adult male of the domesticated cattle, often used for breeding.

name: Chicken
hint: A domesticated bird raised for its meat and eggs.

name: Donkey
hint: A domesticated equine animal known for its braying sound.

name: Emu
hint: A large flightless bird native to Australia.

name: Gander
hint: A male goose, known for its distinctive honking.

name: Hen
hint: A female chicken, typically used for laying eggs.

name: Iguana
hint: A reptile with scales and a long tail, not typically a farm animal.

name: Jackrabbit
hint: A large hare known for its long ears and powerful hind legs.

name: Kangaroo
hint: A marsupial known for its powerful hind legs and hopping.

name: Llama
hint: A domesticated South American camelid often used as a pack animal.

name: Mule
hint: A hybrid offspring of a male donkey and a female horse.

name: Nanny Goat
hint: A female goat, often raised for milk production.

name: Ostrich
hint: A large flightless bird known for its long neck and legs.

name: Pony
hint: A small horse breed, often favored by children.

name: Rooster
hint: A male chicken known for its crowing at dawn.

name: Sheepdog
hint: A breed of dog known for herding and guarding sheep.

name: Turkey Vulture
hint: A large bird known for scavenging and feeding on carrion.
